allow: PowerShell($urls = @\("http://127.0.0.1:8765/","http://127.0.0.1:8765/css/styles.css","http://127.0.0.1:8765/js/main.js","http://127.0.0.1:8765/robots.txt","http://127.0.0.1:8765/sitemap.xml","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/CABECERA.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/Finu_logo.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/muneco_graduado.webp"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0}  {1}  {2} bytes" -f $r.StatusCode, $u, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "ERR  $u  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8765","--directory","c:/Users/Axity/Desktop/Finu/finucrochet-produccion" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "Server PID=$\($proc.Id\) en http://127.0.0.1:8765/")

PowerShell(try { Stop-Process -Id 10264 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {}; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8765","--directory","c:/Users/Axity/Desktop/Finu/finucrochet-produccion" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "PID=$\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://127.0.0.1:8765/","http://127.0.0.1:8765/css/styles.css","http://127.0.0.1:8765/js/main.js","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/icons.svg","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/CABECERA.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/coleccion_productos.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/llavero_ositos_coleccion.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/rosa_grande.webp"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0}  {1}  {2} bytes" -f $r.StatusCode, $u, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "ERR  $u  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Iconos SVG \(use href\): $\([regex]::Matches\($html, '<use href="img/icons\\.svg#'\).Count\)"; "Hero slides: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="hero-slide'\).Count\)"; "Stats con counter: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'data-count='\).Count\)"; "Bento cells: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="bento-cell'\).Count\)"; "Filtros galería: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'class="gf'\).Count\)"; "Sección BTS presente: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'id="bts-title"'\).Count -gt 0\)"; "Lightbox WA button: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'id="lbWA"'\).Count -gt 0\)"; "Cursor toggle: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'id="cursorToggle"'\).Count -gt 0\)"; "Caveat font cargada: $\([regex]::Matches\($html, 'family=Caveat'\).Count -gt 0\)")

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/flores_amarillo.png","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/flores_rosado.png","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/maomao.png","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/perro_personalizado.png","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/virgen_de_guadalupe.png","http://127.0.0.1:8765/js/main.js"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0}  {1}  {2:N0} bytes" -f $r.StatusCode, $u, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "ERR  $u  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/flores_amarillo.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/flores_rosado.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/maomao.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/perro_personalizado.webp","http://127.0.0.1:8765/img/virgen_de_guadalupe.webp"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0}  {1}  {2:N0} bytes" -f $r.StatusCode, $u, $r.RawContentLength } catch { "ERR  $u  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
